report_metadata.step_description: NOTE: Only process documents with route_to_step=5 (document_category="Site Plan"). TAL spreadsheet files and Design Brief files must be excluded. Using the processing plan from Step 2, filter the document list to only those where 'document_category' is 'Site Plan'. Do not process any document tagged as 'Design Brief'. For each Site Plan document, run the two-phase extraction defined in proc-extract-site-plan-info. Phase 1 extracts all numbered notes and callout annotations (ATTENTION/WARNING/CAUTION/NOTICE) from every page of the drawing in full. Phase 2 analyses those extracted notes to produce four structured checks: (1) Substation Data — extract the seven Substation Notes fields (Substation Asset Number, Transformer Size, HV Switchgear with 1.5MVA Siemens RLR override rule, Voltage Level, LV Switchgear, Cubicle Size, Earthing); (2) Assets Field Check Compliance — verify note 'HAVE ALL EXISTING ASSETS BEEN FIELD CHECKED AND ARE ACCURATE AT THE TIME OF DRAWING' is present and answered YES; (3) Easement Restriction — check for the swimming pool restriction-on-use-of-land easement note; (4) Easement Substation — check for the padmount substation easement note with dimensions and lot number.
report_metadata.validation_criteria: Must return a JSON object with 'total_files' and 'extractions' array containing only documents where 'document_category' is 'Site Plan'. Must not include any Design Brief documents. Each extraction must include 'filename', 'page_size', 'requires_chunking', 'chunk_strategy', 'estimated_chunks', and 'sub_step_extractions'. The 'sub_step_extractions' object must contain all of the following keys: 'sub-step-extract-all-notes' (complete numbered notes from every page — value must be a non-empty string containing at minimum the first numbered note), 'sub-step-substation-data' (multi-line formatted string with exactly these seven field labels: Substation Asset Number, Transformer Size, HV Switchgear, Voltage Level, LV Switchgear, Cubicle Size, Earthing — each followed by a colon and a value or NOT FOUND), 'sub-step-field-check' (one of: YES, NOT COMPLETED, NO — NON-COMPLIANT, NOT FOUND — MISSING: this compliance note is mandatory), 'sub-step-easement-restriction' (verbatim note text with lot number, or NOT REQUIRED, or NOT FOUND — REQUIRED), 'sub-step-easement-substation' (verbatim note text with easement dimensions and lot number, or NOT REQUIRED, or NOT FOUND — REQUIRED). The 'page_size' field must be one of: 'A4', 'A3', 'A2', 'A1', 'A0', or 'large-format'. When 'requires_chunking' is true, 'chunk_strategy' must be 'quadrant-split' or 'page-split' and 'estimated_chunks' must be greater than 1. For 'sub-step-substation-data': NOT FOUND values for all fields are acceptable for pole transformer projects that have no padmount substation notes block — do not fail this check solely because all values are NOT FOUND. For 'sub-step-field-check': NOT COMPLETED is a valid result when the note is present but the YES/NO answer has not been filled in by the designer. VARIANCE TOLERANCE: the variance validator applies fuzzy similarity matching (threshold 97%) to long text fields such as 'sub-step-extract-all-notes' — minor punctuation differences, trailing conjunctions (e.g. ', or' vs ','), and equivalent whitespace variations are absorbed and do not count as unique values. Only genuine content differences (e.g. missing or reordered notes, truncated text with similarity below 97%) are flagged as inconsistencies. Structured short fields (substation data values, field-check result, easement text) use exact matching and must be identical across all runs.
